heading: Permits to occupy land
label: 430c Permits to occupy land
text: Upon such terms and conditions as he may prescribe, the Secretary of the Interior is authorized to permit any person occupying any land within the boundaries of such park to continue to occupy such land, but the Secretary may revoke such permit at any time.
notes: Transfer of FunctionsTransfer of administrative functions of park, see note set out under .section 430a of this title
